User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://sweetlayers.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_/
Disallow: /private/

# Allow search engines to crawl everything else
Allow: /*.html$
Allow: /*.css$
Allow: /*.js$
Allow: /images/

# Crawl delay to prevent server overload
Crawl-delay: 10
